tool: Stream Bandit Code Labs Assistant Workbench
purpose: Machine-readable map for ChatGPT connector work. This is for assistant-side scanning and controlled GitHub/Code Labs/Supabase decisions, not for Trevor to operate manually.

primary_reads: Code_Labs_V104.get_code_labs_context for saved projects, packets, tests and audit
Supabase SQL over code_labs_* tables when Supabase tool is available
primary_writes: GitHub branch + PR + merge after scan
Supabase only for Code Labs support metadata when explicitly needed

known_receipt_versions.V120: Build handoff packet and copy fixed file

assistant_preferred_flow: Read current target from GitHub first.
Read Code Labs context next to see saved project, packet, tests and audit.
Read Supabase code_labs_* tables when available for latest file snapshots and duplicates.
Avoid asking Trevor to paste code unless all connector reads fail.
Open one controlled branch for each real change.
Merge only when scope is small and safe.
do_not_touch_without_reason: social pages unless social pass is active

next_real_upgrade.name: Assistant-readable current file sync
next_real_upgrade.goal: Make Code Labs save the current selected file/path/hash into a server-readable Code Labs packet or table so ChatGPT can read it through Code_Labs_V104.get_code_labs_context without Trevor copying anything.
next_real_upgrade.preferred_method: Use existing Code Labs Supabase helper/history path if possible; avoid new Stream Bandit app schema.
next_real_upgrade.fallback_method: Add a small Code Labs-only JSON snapshot page/helper and queue via existing code_labs_packets or code_labs_write_requests.
